name: add-conditional-field-to-form
query: In the Tally form 7Roovz, show the 'spouse income' question only when the user answers Yes to 'married'.
expected_behavior: Calls load_form with formId 7Roovz first to start the editing session
Default-hides the target field via configure_blocks (visibility isHidden:true) before adding the SHOW rule
Uses apply_logic with a WHEN <questionUuid> IS <optionBlockUuid> THEN SHOW <questionUuid>, REQUIRE <questionUuid> rule, chaining actions with commas not AND
Calls save_form at the end and reports the returned form URL
